name: Cocoa-Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Grease and flour a 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the nuts.
4. Beat with a spoon for 30 seconds.
5. Stir in the nuts.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 65 to 70 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes, then remove the loaf from the pan.
9. Wrap tightly in Aluminum foil and cool completely before cutting.
